news.t: Options Market Now Open for T-REX 2X Long MSTR Daily Target ETF (CBOE: MSTU)
REX Shares and Tuttle Capital Management Launch 2x Leveraged and Inverse MSTR Daily Target ETFs

overview.description: The T-Rex 2X Inverse MSTR Daily Target ETF (MSTZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Strategy Inc Class A index. The fund aims to provide (-2x) inverse exposure to the daily price movement of MicroStrategy Inc. stock (NASDAQ: MSTR), less fees and expenses. MSTZ was launched on Sep 18, 2024 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.
